creator: gerard@seibercom.net
text:
The port fails to build. The entire build log is available here: http://seibercom.net/logs/libxine.log

This is a copy from the end of the build log.

ff_video_decoder.c:141: warning: 'AVPaletteControl' is deprecated
ff_video_decoder.c: In function 'get_buffer':
ff_video_decoder.c:381: error: 'AVFrame' has no member named 'extended_data'
ff_video_decoder.c: In function 'ff_handle_special_buffer':
ff_video_decoder.c:1306: warning: 'AVPaletteControl' is deprecated
gmake[4]: *** [xineplug_decode_ff_la-ff_video_decoder.lo] Error 1
gmake[4]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
gmake[4]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/multimedia/libxine/work/xine-lib-1.2.4/src/combined/ffmpeg'
gmake[3]: *** [all] Error 2
gmake[3]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/multimedia/libxine/work/xine-lib-1.2.4/src/combined/ffmpeg'
gmake[2]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/multimedia/libxine/work/xine-lib-1.2.4/src/combined'
gmake[1]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/multimedia/libxine/work/xine-lib-1.2.4/src'
gmake: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.
Try to set MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes and rebuild before reporting the failure to
the maintainer.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/multimedia/libxine.

How-To-Repeat: Attempt to build the port.
